summary: Completed comprehensive testing of IndCoders website UI/UX refinements iteration. Backend APIs working perfectly at 100% success rate. All frontend refinements successfully implemented and tested with 100% success rate. Contact form integration, mobile responsiveness, and new CTA section all working flawlessly.
passed_tests: Hero section shows updated headline: 'Where Developers Don't Just Learn — They Build' with gradient on 'Don't Just Learn'
Hero has no downward arrow icon (successfully removed)
Hero has Developer Community badge with live green dot indicator and pulse animation
About section shows updated heading: 'We Started with a Simple Idea'
Why Choose section shows updated heading: 'What Makes Us Different'
Building section displays timeline layout with phase labels (NOW, NEXT, SOON, VISION)
Building section has vertical timeline line connecting items
CTA section exists before footer with heading: 'Ready to Stop Watching and Start Building?'
CTA section has 'Get Started' button that smoothly scrolls to contact section
Contact heading reads: 'Let's Build Something Together'
Contact form submits successfully to backend /api/contact with form clearing after success
Team cards show role badges (Founder & Lead, Core Contributor, Open for Contributors)
Team cards show taglines for each member
All sections have proper section divider lines between them (41 divider elements found)
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
Mobile navigation menu opens and closes properly
Mobile contact form is fully interactive and functional
Footer displays correctly with 6 links
Consistent card styling with bg-[#111111]/40 and border-white/[0.06] (27 cards)
Proper section spacing with py-28 md:py-40 (8 sections)
Backend API endpoints: GET/POST /api/contact, GET/POST /api/status all working 100%
Backend validation working correctly (returns 422 for invalid data)

success_percentage.mobile: 100% (fully responsive with working navigation and forms)
